name: feature.workflow-author.nodes
description: AI Workflow Author node pack (ADR 0072 / ADR 0014) — the meta-workflow building blocks that author OTHER workflows over the ctx.features['workflow-author'] surface. draft (LLM authors a graph from the live node catalog), validate (re-check against the closed-world catalog + registration contract), persist (register the validated WorkflowDefinition). Wired draft→validate→persist they are the workflow-builder brain.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Workflow Author: Draft
nodes.description: Reads the live node catalog as a closed-world menu and calls the LLM to author a candidate WorkflowDefinition for a natural-language intent, repairing on validation errors up to maxAttempts. Requires ctx.callAI + ctx.features['workflow-author'].

nodes.label: Workflow Author: Validate
nodes.description: Re-checks a candidate WorkflowDefinition against the closed-world node catalog + the shared registration contract (structural + RFC 0022 §C gate). Fails the run when invalid so persist never fires.

nodes.label: Workflow Author: Persist
nodes.description: Registers a validated WorkflowDefinition through the shared registration path so it opens in the builder canvas. Output carries the authored workflowId.
